LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR'S MOTION TO APPROVE ITS PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT SIGVARIS, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, MATTER NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And (Proposed) Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No apppearance on this matter, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Laurence Vinocur's motion to approve its Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Sigvaris, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. The moving party is to prepare a form of order and judgment. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/HK)
